---
title: "The Rev. Henry Wilberforce"
---

## The Rev. Henry Wilberforce

**Dates:** (1807-1873)

### Description

Vicar of East Farleigh

### Biography

Youngest son of William Wilberforce (1759-1833), he married Mary Sargent (1811-1878), whose sisters had married Manning and his brother Samuel Wilberforce. He was Vicar of Deal and then East Farleigh before he followed his wife into the Roman Catholic church on 15 September 1850.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 22nd [1866]
- Letter from March 6 1865
- Letter from 20 October [1850]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
